title: Stock Market Today: Dow Jones, S&P 500 Rally After Trump Hints At De-Escalation With China—Mag 7, Fastenal, Lucid In Focus
full_text: U.S. stock futures rallied on Monday, with the Dow Jones, S&P 500, and Nasdaq 100 all showing significant gains following a sell-off on Friday. This rebound was partly attributed to a hint of de-escalation with China by President Donald Trump and strong premarket surges in Magnificent 7 stocks. The article also highlights key stocks, analyst insights on market valuations, upcoming economic data, and the performance of commodities and global equity markets.
